notes: This file is a working status/memory board for the solver coverage rows against the v15.7 contract.
It does not redefine the formal meaning of parsed-only, partial, full, fixture classes, or final validation target.
Its purpose is to keep the current repo-visible row state convergent with the Phase 0 audit surface.
Row declarations may now carry explicit proof_expectations metadata for Phase 0 audit alignment; when absent, older inference remains the fallback.

rows.runtime_surface: canonical local-axis ARI math in solver/state.js and solver/engine.js
notes: Public-path executable surface exists.
A row-scoped core contrast fixture now proves maintained local-axis profile changes produce different canonical outputs under a fixed event frame.
A dedicated anti-collapse core fixture now protects local-axis ARI math against cross-axis local-shell flattening under a stable runtime frame.
A row-scoped integration fixture now proves core-facing coexistence of canonical local-axis outputs with relation, envelope, and cascade outputs.
Still missing the fuller invariant bundle required for full.

rows.runtime_surface: solver/relation.js triadic participation via source / medium / receiving
notes: Medium-sensitive relation handling is executable and hard-gated in Phase 0.
Anti-collapse and integration surfaces are now started for the relation row.
Still lacks the fuller modern corpus and invariant suite required for full.

Still not full because row-local and cross-phase invariant suites remain incomplete.
